Conditional information 83 AMM 63-11-00,4-3 pump AMM 63-11-00 4-4 HI 25 - B3 rinted by g est on 026-04-20 Disassembly - Drive system of the belt-driven hydraulic Assembly - Drive system of the belt-driven hydraulic pump

AMM 63-11-00,6-19 bearing A.3. General information None B. Special Tools Commercial Commercial C. Materials None Detailed inspection criteria - Belt-driven hydraulic pump drive mirror light source D. Routine Replacement Parts None E. Job Set-up E.I. Open the MGB cowlings. F. Procedure figure 1: Belt-driven hydraulic pump bearing POST MOD 079566 POST MOD 079568 and PRE MOD 0770000 NOTE If there is any doubt during the visual check, perform a detailed inspection ( AMM 63-11 00,6-19 F.I. Visual check of the sealing of the drive bearing (2 of the hydraulic pump (1) NOTE Perform the check on each sealing cheek plate (use a mirror and a light source (4) for the cheek plate on the hydraulic pump side). a. Check of the condition of the sealing cheek plates (4) Ü (1) Make sure that the general condition of the sealing cheek plate o o z o o z 1 o o o z o o o z o correct: no deformations, dents, wear, tears, crazing. H125 - AS350 B2-B3 Rev.022.OO AMM 63-11-00,6-15B 83 Printed by guest on 2026-04-20

(2) Make sure that the condition of the four lubrication holes (3) is correct: no wear, tears, crazing. (3) Make sure that the sealing cheek plate (4) is correctly positioned in the grooves of the external and internal bush of the bearing (4) Make sure that there is no wear, tears or crazing at the sealing lips (5) of the cheek plate (4) b. Make sure that there is no loss of grease caused by one or more of the deteriorations detailed during the check of the cheek plates above. (4) c. Make sure that there are no runs of rust at the sealing cheek plate (4) or traces of heating (brown coloring) on the internal bush of the bearing F.2. Interpretation of the results If one of the deteriorations is noticed during the check, replace the drive bearing of the hydraulic pump ( AMM 63-11-00,4-3 ), ( AMM 63-11-00,4-4 G. Close-up G.I.
